description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a dark metallic receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden handguard and pistol grip. The rifle is equipped with a folding metal stock, which is slim and skeletal in design, allowing for compact storage and transport. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, typically associated with 7.62mm ammunition. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a front post and rear notch for aiming. The muzzle is fitted with a slotted flash hider, designed to reduce visible muzzle flash during firing. The overall construction combines steel, wood, and polymer components, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a folding metal stock, wooden handguard, and curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a slotted flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, with the muzzle and flash hider directly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the folding metal stock, wooden handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the receiver, handguard, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the folding stock, magazine, and wooden grip, mirroring the left side.
